title: Evangelion related game
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion related game?!             Quote Post by reagen » Sat Aug 13, 2005 2:07 am Sorry to dissapoint you, I'm not giving a link to a game, in fact I'm asking if any of you know one? Because i read somewhere in the forum that someone found a sim game on Evangelion on the net, And i just can't wait to ask him where!! Until....the electricity dies!! So, 2 hours later i forgot where i found that post. And ended up creating this thread, if anyone know please post here!! Any game related to Evangelion, and that sim game!! THANKS!!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Sep 28, 2005 9:53 pm You might be thinking of this: http://www.evamonkey.com/flash/so_cubed_eva_4_dating_sim_rpg.swf OMG. A month and a half later!

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Thu Sep 29, 2005 8:55 pm Gee..thanks, monkey!! Appreciate it!

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Sep 29, 2005 9:47 pm I take it then that was what you were looking for?

[]:             Quote Post by reagen » Fri Sep 30, 2005 7:50 am Yeah, a member mention it on some thread. And i was wondering where can i find it?! And to found out it was on the site, i was really surprised!!
